tasks.goal: Regenerate the NodeAgent storyboard proof clip and bind it to smoke receipts.
steps: Inspect README media and docs/eval receipts.
assertions: Frame and dashboard smoke receipts pass.

tasks.goal: Verify the portable NodeAgent frame spine without provider keys.
assertions: SQLite path writes a local receipt.

tasks.goal: Prove the assistant-ui chat scaffold keeps NodeAgent tool surfaces visible.
steps: Open the generated chat scaffold guidance.
Confirm no-key local adapter path is described.

tasks.goal: Verify NodeMem passive scan, dedupe, dismissal learning, and policy gates.
assertions: No job auto-executes from passive scan.

tasks.goal: Validate the NodeMem README media as an explicit storyboard proof receipt.
steps: Compare README caption to the proof contract.
assertions: GIF checksum and byte size are recorded.
Storyboard includes passive scan, suggestion, approval, dismissal, storage.
README links to NodeRoom with canonical casing.

tasks.goal: Design the NodeGraph memory-cluster view for NodeMem suggestions and dismissals.
steps: Map entity, mention, suggestion, approval, dismissal, policy, and job nodes.
Ask NodeAgent why the suggestion is noteworthy.
assertions: Dismissal and approval state are visible.
The graph does not imply an automatic job ran.

tasks.goal: Regenerate the NodeTrace walkthrough media from storyboard-governed screenshots.
steps: Confirm Trace Lens story beats are visible.
assertions: Storyboard covers no-key install, tagged surfaces, Trace Lens, proof/runtime split, Builder safety.
README uses canonical NodeTrace GitHub shorthand.

tasks.goal: Run the standalone NodeTrace capture-plan smoke without requiring a sibling NodeRoom checkout.
steps: Run npm run smoke for CLI and MCP validation.
assertions: Capture dry run passes with one fixture step.

tasks.goal: Generate the NodeTrace Trace Coach SQLite proof from live NodeRoom source or embedded snapshots.
setup: Optionally place a sibling NodeRoom checkout.
assertions: Script works in snapshot mode without a sibling checkout.

tasks.goal: Use NodeGraph to show trace causality across UI surface, runtime event, proof card, source file, screenshot, and receipt.
steps: Build nodes from surface ids, trace ids, proof cards, events, source files, screenshots, and receipts.
assertions: Source file and screenshot evidence can be inspected.

tasks.goal: Create a public NodeRL episode storyboard from trace to reward to memory to repair to export.
steps: Document the episode goal, action, observation, evaluation, reward, memory, repair, and dataset export.
Bind each stage to a receipt or spec file.
assertions: Certification and exploration loops remain separated.
Reward is not self-graded by the proposing agent.

tasks.goal: Verify NodeRL reward, memory, and dataset-export boundaries for one benchmark-style task.
steps: Run or inspect the eval receipt.
Trace how reward fields are derived.
Confirm memory/export records do not include answer keys or self-promoted scores.

tasks.goal: Run the NodeSEO static audit under the storyboard proof contract.
steps: Confirm private route noindex and static SEO checks are separated.
assertions: No ranking success is claimed from static checks alone.

tasks.goal: Generate a Search Console report without scraping rankings or simulating clicks.
setup: Provide Search Console credentials when available.
steps: Run npm run search-console with a site URL.
Inspect the JSON and Markdown report.
Compare query/page evidence to visual QA output.
assertions: Search Console is treated as query-performance source of truth.
No fake click or ranking scrape workflow is introduced.

tasks.goal: Capture a landing/search-origin journey and pass review media to Gemini visual QA.
setup: Configure target URL and optional Gemini key.
steps: Run Playwright journey or Chrome CDP capture.
assertions: Gemini output is labeled visual QA, not official SEO proof.

tasks.goal: Ask NodeAgent to find review blockers from the entity graph.
setup: Open work surface graph through the graph-tab DOM contract.
assertions: Room trace or public chat can carry the workpaper.

tasks.goal: Ask NodeAgent for source-backed evidence around a selected graph node.
setup: Select a company node when present.
assertions: needs_review is not treated as source-backed.

tasks.goal: Trace person-to-company relationships and connected project or achievement clusters.
steps: Ask NodeAgent who researched the company.
assertions: People nodes remain connected to companies.

tasks.goal: Use the Streamlit quick prompt to ask NodeAgent for evidence.
Type an @nodeagent chat prompt in Streamlit and receive a second turn.
Ask public NodeAgent to research a company row from chat.
assertions: Final response appears in public chat.

tasks.goal: Ask public NodeAgent to identify runway or evidence gaps.
assertions: Gaps are called out as review items.
No backend mutation bypass is required.

tasks.goal: Open trace, filter by event kind, and group runs.
Review pending agent proposals without direct mutation bypass.
setup: Seed proposal or run NodeAgent in review mode.
assertions: Accepted proposal mutates through review path.

tasks.goal: Edit a spreadsheet cell, inspect evidence, and export XLSX.
Drive the generic company research grid through pending/enriched statuses.
steps: Ask NodeAgent to enrich pending rows.

tasks.goal: Ask NodeAgent to create or update a notebook outline.
Apply a governed single-block notebook edit.
assertions: Human prose is annotated instead of blindly replaced.

tasks.goal: Upload CSV/XLSX/text/PDF inputs and verify artifacts appear.
Reject an oversized or invalid file without partial commit.
Prove managed locks, CAS, drafts, and cleanup across actors.
setup: Join same room as host and guest.

tasks.goal: Export signed evidence bundle with visibility boundaries.
Verify room home work lanes and open artifact routing.
assertions: Artifact opens without losing room state.

tasks.goal: Use command palette to open graph and trace surfaces.
assertions: Graph and trace open through DOM-level contracts.
Listeners clean up after repeated use.

tasks.goal: Verify voice/chat composer provider path where available.
steps: Submit transcribed prompt when provider exists.

tasks.goal: Run Finch local product-path proxy without claiming official score.
Run FinAuditing local risk/misstatement review proxy.
Run WorkstreamBench local spreadsheet-workstream proxy.
Run Finch proxy through fresh live room public @nodeagent.
steps: Wait for completion phrase or final answer.

tasks.goal: Run FinAuditing proxy through fresh live room public @nodeagent.
assertions: Official score remains blocked unless verifier accepts artifacts.

tasks.goal: Run WorkstreamBench proxy through fresh live room public @nodeagent.
assertions: Product path completion is separate from official semantic score.

tasks.goal: Run BankerToolBench live suite through NodeRoom browser path.
Build ledger of prod browser adapter contracts.
Build prod proxy benchmark matrix across models and task targets.
assertions: No full all-task winner is claimed from adapter-only smoke.

tasks.goal: Plan long-run prod proxy queue.
steps: Inspect queue, budget, and blocked lanes.

tasks.goal: Run Proximitty intake scenario with synthetic underwriting data.
Run Proximitty risk research scenario.
setup: Load source pack and risk notes.

tasks.goal: Generate underwriting packet proof artifacts.
Run accounting variance-analysis scenario.
Run spreadsheet reconciliation scenario.
Run invoice extraction scenario.
Run financial statement QA scenario.
Run Notion warm-intro scenario.
assertions: Lead and meeting context are used.

tasks.goal: Run Notion follow-up scenario.
assertions: Follow-up action is grounded in meeting notes.

tasks.goal: Run automated pipeline scenario.
Run meeting prep scenario.
Run SEC/XBRL fixture task against benchmark manifest.
Validate that certification and exploration loops stay separate.
assertions: Repair loop cannot grade its own homework.
